description_long: This object is a classic ring-shaped donut with a smooth, glossy chocolate glaze covering its entire surface. The donut has a deep, rounded central hole and a slightly puffed, even toroidal body, suggesting a well-risen, yeast-based dough. The chocolate glaze appears thick and evenly distributed, with a rich, dark brown color and a subtle sheen that reflects light. There are no visible toppings, decorations, or textural variations on the surface, giving it a clean and appetizing appearance. The donut is unwrapped and not presented with any packaging or branding. Its size and finish suggest it would be commonly found in bakeries, cafes, or urban food vendors.
description: A ring-shaped donut with a smooth, glossy chocolate glaze and no visible toppings or packaging.
description_view_0: Front view shows the donut's round shape, deep central hole, and even chocolate glaze.
description_view_1: Side-angled view highlights the donut's puffed body and the reflective sheen of the glaze.
description_view_2: Rear view is nearly identical to the front, showing the uniformity of the glaze and shape.
description_view_3: Opposite side view again emphasizes the smooth, glossy surface and consistent toroidal form.
attribute_icing_type: chocolate glaze; smooth, glossy, and evenly coated
